About Us

A living room disguised
as a café.

Tucked into the Old Rajinder Nagar market, Tree House Cafe has become the corner where the neighbourhood slows down — a warm-lit hangout for long coffees, easy conversations, and comfort food that doesn't take itself too seriously. Regulars tend to have a "usual," and we tend to remember it.

From our own signature blend to an all-day menu built for students, families and everyone in between, every table here is set for staying a while — not just passing through.

"The staff is cordial, and the ambience is quite decent — the perfect place to grab an evening snack without burning a hole in your pocket."

— a recurring theme in our public reviews

4.7★ Rated Veg & Non-Veg Dine-in · Swiggy · Zomato

4.7★
